AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Etgo_Identifier
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: The sequence indicates the order for the properties within the identifier.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The sequence indicates the order for the properties within the identifier.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Etgo_Email
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: An email address for a specified business partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Email Address is the Electronic Mail ID for this User and should be fully qualified (e.g. joe.smith@company.com).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Etgo_Web
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A website URL for a specified business partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Web field identifies the website associated with the record.

AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Etgo_Isperson
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the business partner is a person (Y) or a company (N).
AD_COLUMN.HELP: When set to Y, the Contacts window displays first name and last name fields instead of the commercial name. Defaults to N (company).

AD_COLUMN.NAME: EM_Etgo_Phone
AD_COLUMN.DESCRIPTION: A telephone number for a specified business partner.
AD_COLUMN.HELP: The Phone field identifies a telephone number
